path.style: stroke: rgb(0,0,0); stroke-width: 4; stroke-dasharray: none; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-dashoffset: 0; stroke-linejoin: miter; stroke-miterlimit: 4; fill: none; fill-rule: nonzero; opacity: 1;;fill:none;stroke:rgb(0, 0, 0);color:rgb(251, 251, 254);stroke-width:4px;stroke-linecap:round;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:1;font-family:"Anthropic Sans", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:400;text-anchor:start;dominant-baseline:auto
